metadata.description: The 21st.dev plugin marketplace: search, install and publish React/shadcn components, themes and templates for coding agents.

plugins.name: 21st
plugins.description: Search, install and publish React/shadcn components, themes and templates on 21st.dev from your agent. Bundles the 21st.dev skills (21st-cli-use, 21st-ai, 21st-registry, 21st-design-sync) and wires up the remote 21st MCP server in one install.
